payload.evidenceBoundary: Deterministic CPU-only synthetic falsification study; not a benchmark contribution, new cache method, quantization result, hardware measurement, or breakthrough claim.

byteIdenticalRerun.requirement: A fresh Node.js process on the same clean committed tree produces byte-identical canonical core evidence.

completeCellsAndRouting.requirement: Exactly 150 abrupt cells complete with identical routing in every arm.

detector.requirement: At least 27 of 30 shifts are detected within 64 tokens with at most 0 pre-boundary events.

gatedMedianNoWorseThanFrozen.requirement: The gated arm's median primary traffic is no worse than the frozen detected action.

harmfulExecutedActions.requirement: At most 0.1 of executed gated actions are harmful.

maximumRegression.requirement: No abrupt cell regresses by more than 2% versus no action.

oracleActionableEffect.requirement: Oracle-actionable cells improve median primary traffic by at least 5% and the cluster-bootstrap upper bound is below zero.

oracleCoverage.requirement: At least 30 cells across 3 capacities have at least 10% finite-action-oracle headroom.

semanticRoutingChangesZero.requirement: Every arm preserves the exact trace and reports zero semantic routing changes.

stationaryControls.requirement: Detector events and gated actions are each at most 1 per 10,000 stationary tokens.
